description: DiscordOS adapter for the canonical board and Discord writer.

notes: Verification is repo-local and must not send Discord messages, mutate board cards, load production environment, deploy, or call live readback.
The governed canary that follows this preparation remains no-send; live-write claims require production-environment readiness and exact bot-backed readback of the target after the write.

docsUpdateRules: DiscordOS is the one logical writer for the canonical board and Discord. Do not introduce a second board or Discord writer through this adapter.

Host capability is not authority to access Discord, deploy, production, or live data. Live-write claims require production-environment readiness plus exact bot-backed readback of the target channel, thread, or card.

Vercel production actions remain approval-gated: explicit approval must be current-thread and per named project; generic approval does not authorize a production deployment, promotion, rollback, or alias cutover.
